entities.name: Pricing Triangle
entities.context: Three-legged mental model for pricing decisions with job descriptions, seats, and time as the legs; at least one must be bounded

entities.name: Job Descriptions
entities.context: One leg of the pricing triangle; represents scope dimension in pricing

entities.name: Seats
entities.context: One leg of the pricing triangle; represents volume/capacity dimension in pricing

entities.name: Time
entities.context: One leg of the pricing triangle; represents duration dimension in pricing

relationships.context: Job descriptions form one of the three legs of the pricing model
Seats form one of the three legs of the pricing model
Time forms one of the three legs of the pricing model
